km.Bayworth, Berkshire, England: បាយវូរត, បឺកសហីរេ, ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: 當Jordan de Sandford於1115年出生在英國波克夏貝華斯時，他的父親Robert de Sandford I30歲，母親Adeliza Malbank26歲。他於大約1143年與Mrs Jordan Sandford在英國英格蘭波克夏貝華斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1175年在他的家鄉享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jordan de Sandford于1115年出生在英国波克夏貝華斯时，他的父亲Robert de Sandford I30岁，母亲Adeliza Malbank26岁。他于大约1143年与Mrs Jordan Sandford在英国英格兰波克夏貝華斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1175年在他的家乡享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sandford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in England with names derived from Old English sand ‘sand’ + ford ‘ford, river crossing’, such as Sandford in Warcop (Westmorland), Sandford in Sonning and Dry Sandford in Abingdon (both Berkshire), Sandford on Thames and Sandford Saint Martin (both Oxfordshire), Great and Little Sampford (Essex), Sandford Orcas (Dorset), Sandford, Sampford Courtney, Sampford Peverell, and Sampford Spiney (all Devon), Sampford Arundel and Sampford Brett (both Somerset), and Sandford (Shropshire). See also Sandiford .

nameMeanings.name: Jordan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a name given to a child of either sex baptized in holy water that was, purportedly at least, brought from the River Jordan, whose Hebrew name, ha-yarden, means ‘flowing down’. It was in this river that Christ was baptized by John the Baptist, and medieval pilgrims to the Holy Land usually tried to bring back a flask of its water with them. The modern given name is either a revival of this, or else a transferred use of the surname that was derived from the medieval given name. It is more popular as a boy's name in Britain and as a girl's name in the United States.

en.lifeSummary: When Jordan de Sandford was born in 1115, in Bayworth, Berkshire, England, his father, Robert de Sandford I, was 30 and his mother, Adeliza Malbank, was 26. He married Mrs Jordan Sandford about 1143, in Bayworth, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1175, in his hometown, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jordan de Sandford est né en 1115, à Bayworth, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Sandford I, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Adeliza Malbank, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Jordan Sandford environ 1143, à Bayworth, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1175, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jordan de Sandford 1115 in Bayworth, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Sandford I 30 und seine Mutter Adeliza Malbank 26. Er hat um 1143 in Bayworth, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom Mrs Jordan Sandford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1175 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jordan de Sandford è nato il nel 1115 nel Bayworth, Berkshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Sandford I, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Adeliza Malbank, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Jordan Sandford circa 1143, nel Bayworth, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1175, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.Bayworth, Berkshire, England: イギリスバークシュアイアバイウオルス
ja.lifeSummary: Jordan de Sandfordが1115年にイギリスバークシュアイアバイウオルスで生まれた時，父Robert de Sandford Iは30歳，母Adeliza Malbankは26歳であった。約1143年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアバイウオルスでMrs Jordan Sandfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1175年に故郷で60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jordan de Sandford(이)가 1115년 영국 버크실르 베이워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Sandford I(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Adeliza Malbank(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1143년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 베이워스에서 Mrs Jordan Sandford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1175년 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jordan de Sandford nasceu em 1115, em Bayworth, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Sandford I, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Adeliza Malbank, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Jordan Sandford aproximadamente 1143, em Bayworth, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1175, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jordan de Sandford родился в 1115 г. в местности беиворт, биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Sandford I было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Adeliza Malbank, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Jordan Sandford около 1143 г. в местности беиворт, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1175 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jordan de Sandford nació en 1115, en Bayworth, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Sandford I, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Adeliza Malbank, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Mrs Jordan Sandford aproximadamente 1143, en Bayworth, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1175, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años.
